infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: BeatSyncVideo needs access to your photo library to pick videos and save edited videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: BeatSyncVideo needs permission to save beat-synced videos to your gallery.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: BeatSyncVideo needs microphone access to analyze audio for beat detection.

plugins.photosPermission: BeatSyncVideo needs access to your photos to pick videos and save edited videos.
